steps.title: Identify the true subject
steps.content: In the clause after "that," the full subject is "her book's musings on tenth-century Japanese courtly life." The head noun is "musings," which is plural, so the verb in the blank must agree with a plural subject.

steps.title: Match the plural subject
steps.content: Choice B uses singular "has," choice C uses singular "is," and choice D uses the singular verb "fascinates." The plural subject "musings" requires the plural present-tense verb "fascinate." The answer is A.
